name: Get list of FHIA Sold Prospects for Windows for Melissa LookAlikes

content.query:
SELECT 
lds.LeadID
,cst.CustomerID
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.[State]
,cst.Zip
,lds.ProductID
,lds.CustomerID
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.DispositionID
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
where 
lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.OperatingCompany = 'FHI'
